To resume things, there are 4 realms, i tried to tell the main points of each realm, you can try to play depending of your liking, you can even mix them but only for a max of 2 realms mix:

Chaos realm (yellow) is mainly for supporting other realms but you can also spam the small thing you'll see soon at the bottom left corner of your screen during battle (only if you go yellow character only) .

Aequor realm (blue) is quite good for newbies in case they lack defense or attacks, just click on the tentacle icon and switch the mode of the tentacle:
- white tentacle gives shields but reduce tentacle dmg
- red tentacle gives more dmg but lose 1 tentacle limit at the end of the turn

Caro realm (red) became more friendly with the recent buff, you have to be careful tho, you use your health in exchange of more dmg, a lot of dps in that realm have more dmg after reaching a low hp threshold. You can also heal youself by the amount of the red orb by clicking on it.

Ultra realm (purple) a bit hard to setup because it require you 5 turns to setup for a nuke turn, each 1st card played get copied into a ultra bar and when it get filled you enter the ultra turn thing where all of those copied cards can be played. You can also discard those card to get 1 insight by clicking on the purple button.

Maybe it would be better to let you taste the realm + characters kit design from trial
